[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00100010 2
1 00001010 2
2 00000000 a
3 00000000 a
4 00000000 a
5 00000000 a
6 00000101 2
7 11000011 4

01 10 11000111 5
12 21 11100011 5
23 32 11101111 7
34 43 11001111 6
45 54 11100001 4
56 65 11100011 5
67 76 01111011 6
70 07 01011111 6

13 31 11001111 6
24 42 11100011 5
35 53 11101111 7
46 64 01100011 4
57 75 11111010 6
60 06 00100111 4
71 17 11011011 6

03 30 10001111 5
14 41 11000011 4 match 7
25 52 11100010 4

47 74 01011011 5
50 05 11100101 5
61 16 11100011 5
72 27 11111010 6

15 51 11100011 5
26 62 11100011 5
37 73 11011111 7
